Package com.example.androidexample

Class DTOmodels.album

java.lang.Object
com.example.androidexample.DTOmodels.album
Enclosing class:
DTOmodels
public static class DTOmodels.album extends Object
Represents an album, containing details such as the title, artist, genre, and its associated list of user reviews.
